overall.description: A first-person cable car journey through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis, ascending from narrow neon-lit urban canyons to panoramic aerial views of the waterfront and industrial districts below. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring high-fidelity game engine graphics with vibrant neon signage and modern glass architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with neon signage

events.description: cable car emerges from building shadow into direct sunlight
cable car begins steep ascent between close buildings

agents.ego_description: ascending in a cable car through a narrow corridor of futuristic buildings with prominent neon signage

entered.detail: large red neon sign shaped like lips mounted on building facade
digital screen displaying WNS advertisement with teal frame
tall building with hexagonal pattern facade and teal coloring
rusted metal structural beams crossing the view

segments.scene_description: The cable car ascends through a narrow urban canyon, passing close to buildings adorned with a prominent red neon lips sign and digital billboards. The space is tight and enclosed, with rusted metal beams and wooden structures filling the frame as the car climbs steeply upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: panoramic aerial view over waterfront and highway interchange

events.description: cable car clears building corridor into open air revealing city river and skyline
passing over multi-level highway interchange with moderate traffic flow

agents.ego_description: gliding high above the city with expansive views of the river, highways, and distant industrial zones

entered.detail: cylindrical building with reflective blue glass and red structural trim
wide river running through the city with bridges and waterfront structures
complex multi-level highway system with moving vehicle traffic
smokestacks and industrial towers visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Breaking free from the urban canyon, the cable car enters open air with a sweeping panoramic view of the city river and distant skyline. A distinctive curved glass tower passes by on the left while the car glides over a busy highway interchange below.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial district with active smokestacks and manufacturing facilities

events.description: entering industrial zone with visible steam emissions from smokestacks
cable car begins gradual descent toward industrial buildings

agents.ego_description: descending through an industrial area with active smokestacks and neon signage on factory buildings

entered.detail: tall chimneys emitting white steam and smoke
low-rise factory building with teal metal facade
bright neon signage with Japanese characters on building corners

segments.scene_description: The cable car descends into an industrial district characterized by active smokestacks emitting steam and factory buildings with vibrant neon signage. The highway now passes directly below as the car approaches the end of its journey through the urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent and descent that transforms from a claustrophobic urban canyon into a sweeping aerial panorama before settling into a gritty industrial zone. It begins with a steep climb through a narrow corridor of rusted beams and wooden structures, passing close to digital billboards and a prominent red neon lips sign. As the cable car breaks free from the enclosed space, the view opens into a wide expanse featuring a curved glass tower and a panoramic vista of the city river and distant skyline. The scene then shifts as the car glides over a busy highway interchange and begins to descend toward an industrial district. Finally, the perspective settles among active smokestacks emitting steam and factory buildings adorned with vibrant neon signage as the journey concludes.
